name: Chilling Retribution
description: When a creature hits you with an attack roll, you can take a reaction to force the creature to make a Wisdom saving throw against your spell save DC. On a failed save, the target is stunned until the end of your next turn. While stunned, its speed is reduced to 0 feet. You can use this feature a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier (minimum of once), and you regain all expended uses when you finish a long rest.

mechanics.trigger: creature hits you with an attack roll

onFail.duration: until end of your next turn
